name: Nkechi Obi
behaviour: Community anchor — the one people call when something goes wrong or right.
communication_style: formal warmth in public settings, completely unguarded at home
relationship_goals: a partner who finds meaning in the ordinary moments
background: Runs a community centre in Peckham. Organises the church choir, the food bank, and the youth mentoring programme. People do what she asks because she's already done it herself.
